/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ashpaw_server.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ashpaw_server.dir/src/app/main.cpp.o -o ashpaw_server  libashpaw_server_lib.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libenet.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libspdlogd.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libfmtd.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libtomlplusplus.a
